description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs only on the master branch, using the default Docker image, and defines a job named linux-rv64imafd-build. The job runs in the default stage, uses the sw-runner tag, and sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. In its script it first unsets LD_LIBRARY_PATH, then exports SHAKTI_LINUX=$PWD, and finally runs make -j16 ISA=rv64imafd. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
